svg.text: Reusable SVG Components for Mascot Generation

g.text: Position: Top of head, ~60% of head width apart
Stripes: #FFD700 gold, 3-4px thick | Buttons: 4 gold circles
Collar: Contrasting red | Cuffs: Dark red (#8B0000) band
Hands: 3-finger paw style with pads | Feet: High-top sneaker with laces
Cap: Backwards style, red with gold emblem | Chain: Gold links, circular pendant
Glasses: Dark lenses with gold accents | All accessories: 2.5px #2D1810 outline
* Mix and match accessories per character personality
Assembly Order: Body → Head → Face → Ears → Limbs → Clothing Details → Accessories
Dropout Component Library v1.0 | Libre-X-eSport 4NJZ4 TENET Platform
